creator: hardy.schumacher@globalfoundries.com
text:
Hello Stefan,

I've rebuilt all applications after the upgrade to FreeBSD-7.3 and everythi=
ng worked without issues.
Therefore I prefer to close this PR.

Regards,
Hardy


-----Original Message-----
From: Stefan Walter [mailto:stefan@freebsd.org]=20
Sent: Tuesday, May 18, 2010 11:25 AM
To: Schumacher, Hardy
Cc: GNATS; Marcelo Araujo
Subject: Re: ports/134414: graphics/mesa-demos does not build on FreeBSD-7.=
2 i386 with NVidia-Driver

Hi Hardy,

there hasn't been an update on your problem report for graphics/mesa-demos
[1] for a while, and the port has been updated in the meantime. Can you
still reproduce the problem with the port's current version, or can this
PR be closed?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/134414
